_comment: Fintech Radar sources. type: sitemap | substack | wp_api | gnews. host = own domain (for self-link filtering).

sources.name: Fintech Brainfood (Simon Taylor)
sources.author: Simon Taylor
sources.note: Newsletter proxy for requested LinkedIn /in/sytaylor (Simon Taylor).

sources.name: Connecting the Dots in Fintech (Siroj Boboev)
sources.author: Siroj Boboev
sources.note: Ghost site; RSS body is empty so we crawl the sitemap and fetch each post. Same author as requested LinkedIn /in/sirojboboev.

sources.name: The Fintech Blueprint (Lex Sokolin)
sources.author: Lex Sokolin
sources.note: Some posts are paid (audience=only_paid); for those only the public preview text is available.

sources.name: TechCrunch — Fintech
sources.note: Full coverage via WordPress REST API (not the 20-item RSS cap). Event/promo posts filtered out.

sources.name: Fintech Futures
sources.note: Site is behind Incapsula (403 to curl, WebFetch and r.jina.ai). Headlines+links via Google News RSS; full body text is NOT available headlessly.
